# Dreamcraft Interiors

> Chennai's #1 rated interior design studio. Trusted by 100+ homeowners across Chennai, rated Rated 4.9/5. We design timeless home interiors with 3D visualization, transparent pricing, and turnkey execution — with a 100% on-time delivery guarantee.

## What we do
- Interior design for homes across Chennai (OMR, Velachery, Adyar, ECR, Thoraipakkam, Nungambakkam)
- 3D visualization: see and feel every room before work begins
- Transparent, itemized pricing with zero hidden costs
- Turnkey execution with a dedicated project manager
- Smart space planning, premium materials, clear timelines, post-project support

## How we work (Dreamcraft Design System™)
1. Book Consultation — a friendly design chat where we listen to your story, taste, and dream
2. Design Your Story — vivid 3D visuals of colors, textures, and light before we begin
3. Deliver Your Dream — we handle every detail from materials to setup

## Proof
- 100+ happy homes, 15+ years experience
- Rated 4.9★
- 100% on-time delivery guarantee
